acceptance_criteria: All process artifact contracts exist in schemas/contracts/v1.
Rust process artifact mirrors round-trip through serde and appear in the embedded schema registry.

open_questions.question: Contract field sets stay additive and aligned with the validator.

objective: Plan the schema and test edits.
change_slices: Create the eight JSON contract definitions.
Add helper enums and structs to the contracts crate.
Update codegen embedding and schema registry tests.
test_scenarios: Round-trip every process artifact via serde_json.
Confirm the embedded schema registry count and process contract presence.

notes: All new contracts are additive v1 additions.
Schema registry tests are updated to include the new contracts.

rollout_notes: Land the schema layer before requiring the validator in CI.
